messages.content: Write a newsletter from the PN Panda Class including the following:  Continuing IEYC Dinosaus Detectives: focusing on Digging up the past and Dinosaur Dilemma, students have completed diggs learned about fossils and helped baby dinosaurs find their mother.  Learning about table manners by reading How do dinosaurs eat their food? students showed great comprehension and have been showing better table manners at school.  preparing for winter celebration and dressing up and performing for parents. Getting ready for winter holidays by making decorations and decorating the tree.  STEAM lessons about restoring old coins, students were suprised to find ketchup is a good cleaner for coins; students enjoyed learning how to make invisible ink and unveiling hidden prints! Cantonese culture week where the students learned about cantonese windows, dim sum, dragon dances and learned a cantonese song to perform infront of the school duirng our monthly assembly.

Dear Parents,

We hope this newsletter finds you well. It has been an exciting and eventful month in the PN Panda Class, and we are excited to share all the wonderful things our students have been learning and experiencing.

Continuing our IEYC unit on "Dinosaur Detectives," our students have been digging up the past and exploring the world of dinosaurs. They have learned about fossils, participated in diggs, and even helped baby dinosaurs find their mother. It has been an engaging and hands-on experience for all, sparking their curiosity about the prehistoric world.

In line with our focus on table manners, our students have been reading the book "How Do Dinosaurs Eat Their Food?" They have shown great comprehension and have been actively demonstrating better table manners at school. We are proud of their progress in this area, and it is a joy to see them growing in their social skills.

With the winter season approaching, we have started preparing for our winter celebration. The students will have the opportunity to dress up and perform for parents, showcasing their creative talents and holiday spirit. Additionally, they have been busy making decorations and decorating the tree, adding a festive atmosphere to our classroom.

In our recent STEAM lessons, our students have been learning about restoring old coins. They were pleasantly surprised to discover that ketchup can act as a good cleaner for coins. It was a fun and educational experience for them, as they explored different methods of restoration. They also enjoyed learning how to make invisible ink and unveiling hidden prints, further enhancing their scientific knowledge and problem-solving skills.

During Cantonese culture week, our students immersed themselves in the vibrant Cantonese culture. They learned about Cantonese windows, dim sum, and dragon dances. Furthermore, they learned a Cantonese song to perform in front of the school during our monthly assembly. It was a beautiful celebration of diversity and cultural appreciation.

We are incredibly proud of our students' enthusiasm and dedication to their learning. Their engagement and growth are a testament to their commitment and the supportive environment we foster in the PN Panda Class.

As always, we thank you for your continued support and partnership. We look forward to the upcoming month, filled with more exciting learning experiences.

Warm regards,

PN Panda Class Teachers

transate to everyday use mandarin: Since the beginning of the semester Eugene has done an incredible job adapting to school life. He is an independent and happy boy at school. By the end of his first semester he has gained many meaningful life skills; he can clock in by himself, take on and take off his shoes and is now more open to trying more foods during lunch time.  We are all so lucky to have him in our classroom, he brings so much joy and energy into our lessons. He is a favorite friend in our class and all the students want to play and give him hugs. He is quick to learn to concepts and he does a great job counting and recognizing numbers. For his English development Eugene puts a lot of effort into learning and imitating the teachers English pronunciation. Eugene has had an enriching and successful first semester in kindergarten.

自开学以来，尤金在适应学校生活方面做得非常出色。他在学校是一个独立而快乐的男孩。在第一个学期结束时，他获得了许多有意义的生活技能：他可以自己打卡，穿脱鞋子，并且现在在午餐时间更愿意尝试更多的食物。我们非常幸运能在我们的教室里有他，他给我们的课堂带来了很多欢乐和活力。他是班里最受欢迎的朋友，所有的学生都想和他一起玩并给他一个拥抱。他很快学会了概念，并且在数数和认识数字方面做得很出色。为了他的英语发展，尤金在学习和模仿老师的英语发音方面付出了很多努力。尤金在幼儿园度过了一个充实和成功的第一个学期。

translate to everyday use mandarin: Be more assertive with other students and not allow them to always get their way. His wants and needs are just as important and he should establish boundaries with others.
Continue to have exposure to English language outside of the classroom, your language ability is flourishing nicely.
You have done a great job being more open minded with food, please continue this and expand the list of foods you will happily eat.

和其他同学更加自信，不要总是让步给他们。你的想法和需求同样重要，你应该与他人建立界限。

继续在课堂外接触英语，你的语言能力正在蓬勃发展。

你在对食物更加开放的方面做得很好，请继续保持这一点，并扩大你乐意尝试的食物品种。

translate to everyday use mandarin: From the very beginning of the semester Bosco showcased independence, confidence, and great language learning abilities. At the beginning it was a bit difficult for him to adjust to a longer school day and he would normally cry during nap time expecting to go home. This behavior did take a bit of time to adjust but he is now a happy student throughout the full school day. Bosco struggles with balance, fine motor skills and gross motor skills but by the end of the semester, he has shown great improvement in these areas at school.  He can now take off and put on his shoes with little assistance and he can now climb and run in the playground with less falling. Bosco has great learning ability and memory capacity, he can hear an English word once and still be able to recall it weeks later. It is very impressive to see how easily learning languages is for Bosco and he has a good ear for pronunciation as well. We are so happy and fortunate to have Bosco in our class he is always such an eager learner which makes teaching him so fun!

自学期开始以来，波斯科展示出独立、自信和良好的语言学习能力。起初，他很难适应较长的学校时间，午休时他经常哭着期待回家。这种行为需要一些时间来适应，但他现在整个学校日都是一个快乐的学生。波斯科在平衡、精细运动技能和整体运动技能方面存在困难，但到学期结束时，在学校这些领域取得了巨大的进步。他现在可以自己脱鞋和穿鞋，并且可以在操场上攀爬和奔跑时跌倒的次数更少了。波斯科具有出色的学习能力和记忆能力，他可以听到一个英语单词一次后，几个星期后依然能记得。看到波斯科学习语言如此轻松，他还能准确发音，真让人印象深刻。我们非常高兴和幸运能在我们班里有波斯科，他总是一个渴望学习的学生，这让教他变得非常有趣！

translate to everyday use mandarin: Continue to practice coloring within the lines and develop a stronger grip.
Try harder to put on your shoes with no assistance.
Be more attentive to what you are doing and how you are moving your body to save yourself from injuries.

继续练习在线条内涂色，并发展更强的握笔能力。

努力尝试自己穿鞋，不要寻求帮助。

更加注意你正在做什么以及你如何移动身体，以避免受伤。

transalte to everyday use mandarin: Kartiy is a very independent child. Since day one of the semester she showcased her independency skills; she was able to follow the school routine, put on and take off her shoes by herself, line up, and eat independently. We were all very impressed with her ability to complete tasks with little to no assistance. Sometimes Kartiy has mood swings which have become more predominant at the end of the semester; we give her lots of love and support and we have seen this helps her be more adjusted and happy at school.  She is also doing a great job developing friendships with the other classmates and their love and support for her has also been a positive input into diminishing her mood swings. At the beginning of the semester Kartiy was always quite happy to participate in lessons and would speak up and answer questions, lately her willingness to be part of a lesson can be a 50/50 chance, most times she can be motivated to partake in a lesson with encouraging words by seeing her classmates enjoying the lesson. We are happy to see Kartiy becoming happy in school again and we are also very excited to see the positive friendships she is developing in the classroom and we do hope she continues to enjoy learning and participating in lessons.

卡蒂是一个非常独立的孩子。自学期开始的第一天起，她展示出了自己的独立能力；她能够遵循学校的日常规程，自己穿脱鞋子，排队，独立进餐。我们对她几乎不需要帮助就能完成任务的能力感到非常印象深刻。有时候，卡蒂会有情绪波动，这在学期末变得更加明显。我们给予她充满爱与支持，我们发现这有助于她在学校更好地适应并保持快乐。她也在与其他同学建立友谊方面做得很好，同学们对她的爱和支持也对减少她的情绪波动有积极的影响。学期开始时，卡蒂总是很乐意参与课程，会积极回答问题。最近，她参与课程的意愿有时会变成五五开，大多数时候，她会在看到同学们享受课程并通过鼓励的话语激励下，参与到课程中。我们很高兴看到卡蒂再次在学校里开心起来，也非常期待她在教室中建立积极的友谊，希望她能继续享受学习并积极参与课程。

translate to everyday use mandarin: Be more open minded when learning during our class times
Continue to practice self-calming techniques and try to use your words to express yourself so others can better assist you.
Continue to grow your friendships, friends are a great source of support when we need them!

在课堂时间学习时更加开放心态。

继续练习自我平静的技巧，并尝试用言辞表达你自己，这样别人就能更好地帮助你。

继续培养友谊，朋友是我们需要时的重要支持来源！

translate to everyday use mandarin: Liya is always full of energy and looking for her next adventure. She is a risk-taker and is always  first to volunteer and is always up for a challenge. She demonstrates incredible fine motor skills and can handle markers and crayons very well. She also has advanced gross motor skills and can throw, climb, run, and jump very skillfully. Liya has demonstrated great independence since day one of the semester. She can eat by herself even though we need to give her reminders to use her spoon or fork; she can take off and put on her shoes by herself and she is able to wash her hands independently and follow all 7 steps for proper clean hands. She is always very open to learning and speaking up in class, she makes teaching very fun because we never know how she will act or what she will say and usually what she does gives us all a great laugh. We are very happy to have Liya in our class she really makes our time at school fun.

莉娅总是充满活力，总是在寻找下一个冒险。她是一个敢于冒险的人，总是第一个自愿者，总是愿意接受挑战。她展示了极好的精细运动技能，能够很好地操作马克笔和蜡笔。她也具有卓越的整体运动技能，可以熟练地扔、爬、跑和跳跃。自学期第一天起，莉娅就展示了极高的独立性。尽管我们需要提醒她使用勺子或叉子，但她可以自己吃饭；她可以自己脱鞋和穿鞋，并且能够独立洗手，并按照正确洗手的七个步骤进行。她总是非常乐于学习，在课堂上大胆发表自己的意见，她的行为和言语总是让我们捧腹大笑。我们非常高兴能在我们班里有莉娅，她真的让我们在学校的时间变得有趣。

translate to everyday use mandarin: Try harder to keep your hands to yourself.
Continue to be exposed to the English language, you are doing such a great job learning and having continued exposure will really help develop a proper pronunciation.
Be encouraged to use your spoon and fork more, be patient with yourself, you can do it!

更加努力保护好自己的手，不要乱碰他人。

继续接触英语，你在学习方面做得很棒，持续暴露会有助于发展正确的发音。

鼓励你多使用勺子和叉子，对自己保持耐心，你一定能做到！

translate tp everyday mandarin: At the beginning of the semester Lucky was having a difficult time adjusting to school life. It was challenging for her to follow routines, follow the classroom rules and to keep up with the school schedule. She would quickly become angered and lash out at the teachers or other students. We are so proud of her development and growth, by the end of the semester she has adjusted to school life, she can follow our classroom rules with no fight, she can complete the weekly schedule and participate in all lessons, and she is doing a great job completing our daily school routines with little to no help. Her transformation in mood and behavior in school has been very impressive and we are all so proud of her hard work and dedication. We are so happy to see her so well adjusted and enjoying learning in our classroom! We are also very thankful of the support we have received from her home life and the love and consistency with discipline the family of Lucky has provided, this incredible change in her school life would not have been possible otherwise.  She is a very happy child in our school now.
学期开始时，拉奇很难适应学校生活。她很难遵守规定，遵守课堂纪律，并跟上学校的日程安排。她经常会很快发怒并对老师或其他学生发脾气。我们为她的成长和进步感到非常自豪，到学期末，她已经适应了学校生活，能够毫无抵抗地遵守我们的课堂纪律，能够完成每周的课程计划并参与所有的课程，同时她在没有或很少帮助下很好地完成了我们的日常学校生活规律。她在学校里情绪和行为的转变令人印象深刻，我们都为
